understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to progress through all levels by maneuvering selectable pieces to push objects onto goal tiles marked with '+', ultimately achieving a WIN condition for the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the specified direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects if they are not blocked; walls generally block movement and prevent pushing through them; selection is done via CLICK to switch to another selectable piece at a specific [x, y] position.
